text.title: figma-ai-ecosystem Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for figma-ai-ecosystem as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Figma Make prototypes connect to real data sources or support dynamic content.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: All Make content is static placeholder; no real data source connection exists.

failure-mode.description: Figma Sites output is used as a CMS or requires frequent content updates.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Figma Sites is not a CMS; any content change requires re-export from Figma. Not suitable for frequently-changing content.

failure-mode.description: AI image expansion generates photorealistic results on complex textures, faces, or branded photography.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: AI image expansion generates plausible but not photorealistic fill — fails on complex textures, faces, branded photography.

failure-mode.description: Figma Draw generative output is used directly in production icon sets without manual cleanup.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Figma Draw vector outputs often require significant manual cleanup for production-ready icon sets.

failure-mode.description: Design token integration is assumed to be complete in Figma Make.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Design token integration in Figma Make is partial; variables from the Figma file are not always respected in generated prototypes.

failure-mode.description: Agent proposes polling Figma Webhooks for Make or Draw completion events.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Figma Webhooks only fire on file events, not on AI feature completion; polling for Make/Draw results via webhooks is architecturally impossible.

failure-mode.description: Agent generates Figma Make prompts longer than 150 words.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The in-app AI uses a limited context window; prompts over 150 words produce degraded output. Keep prompts concise and specific.

failure-mode.description: Agent underestimates Figma Sites SEO limitations for SEO-sensitive use cases.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Figma Sites has no server-side rendering; any page where search visibility matters is not suitable for Figma Sites publishing.

failure-mode.description: Agents will propose Figma Make API endpoints that do not exist — Make is browser-only with no public API as of 2026.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Persistent hallucination in LLM training data; this is the single most common error in Figma AI workflow design.
